sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Philodemus</hi> Philosophus [Phld.] <date TEIform="date">i B.C.</date> <title_ TEIform="title">Acad.Ind. = Academicorum Index,</title_> ed. S. Mekler, Berlin 1902. [p. . . M.] <title_ TEIform="title">D</title_> 1, 3 = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ θεῶν ά, γ´,</foreign> ed. H. Diels, <title_ TEIform="title">Abhandlungen der Berliner Akademie,</title_> 1916, 1917. [Col. or <title_ TEIform="title">Fr.</title_>] <title_ TEIform="title">Herc. = Herculanensia Volumina, Collectio altera,</title_> Naples 1862-76, (i. e. partim inedita) (ex apographis W. Crönert). [No. of papyrus, Col. or <title_ TEIform="title">Fr.</title_>] <title_ TEIform="title">Hom.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ τοῦ καθ᾽ Ὅμηρον ἀγαθοῦ βασιλέως,</foreign> ed. A. Olivieri, Leipzig (T.) 1909. <title_ TEIform="title">Ind.Sto. = Stóicorum Index Herculanensis,</title_> ed. D. Comparetti, </item>
